nasb.text: If it is a matter of power, behold, He is the strong one! And if it is a matter of justice, who can summon Him?

esv.text: If it is a contest of strength, behold, he is mighty! If it is a matter of justice, who can summon him?

cnv.text: 若論力量，他多麼強大， 若論訴訟，他說：‘誰能把我傳來？’

ccb.text: 若论力量，祂甚强大； 若上公堂，谁敢传祂？
